title: Happens every time: Supreme Court on Form 6 submissions in West Bengal
description: Amid protests by the Trinamool Congress over the bulk submission of Form 6 applications by BJP workers, the Supreme Court on Monday said this was not happening for the first time.A Bench of Chief Justice of India (CJI) Surya Kant, Justice Joymalya Bagchi and Justice Vipul Pancholi made the observation during the hearing of a batch of petitions challenging the Special Intensive Revision (SIR) of electoral rolls in the State."Happens every time, not the first time. You can raise objections," CJI K
